message:
fix(clippy): resolve 34 clippy warnings across lib and test code

Fixes: type_complexity in patterns.rs (type alias), Duration readability
in pane_tiers/recorder_replay/runtime/config_profiles, clone_on_copy in
5 proptest files, manual_range_contains in 5 files, unused import, unused
mut, len_zero, int_plus_one, absurd_extreme_comparisons, needless_borrow,
manual_string_new, unnecessary_cast, suboptimal_flops, many_single_char_names,
needless_range_loop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -77,7 +77,7 @@ fn arb_unknown_format_string() -> impl Strategy<Value = String> {
         Just("rich".to_string()),
         Just("binary".to_string()),
         Just("markdown".to_string()),
-        Just("".to_string()),
+        Just(String::new()),
         Just("   ".to_string()),
         Just("jsons".to_string()),
         Just("plaintxt".to_string()),
